'''Skinker's salvage yard''' was on the planet [[Feriae Junction/Legends|Feriae Junction]].<ref name="marvel27" />

It was owned and run by [[Skinker]], who was helped out by [[Polyp]]. Skinker supplied his shop with [[Droid/Legends|droids]] captured by scavenger ships which he repaired and sold on. He supplied [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]] with droid parts to destroy, and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] sought him out to acquire droid parts for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].<ref name="marvel27" />
